placements.overview:
Jagran Lakecity University Bhopal is a private university established under Section 2(f) of UGC Act 1956 and is based out of Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. The University has been awarded several prestigious awards such as 'University of the Year' by the Government of Madhya Pradesh for consecutive four years. JLU Bhopal has been ranked 1 for Private University in Madhya Pradesh” in the year 2016, 2017, 2018 and 2019 by several leading publications. Jagran Lakecity University, in a unique academic collaboration with ImaginXP, offers BDes and MDes programmes.

The University offers all basic facilities, including Wi-Fi enabled campus, a cafeteria, accommodation facilities, sports complex, transport facilities and a library.

ImaginXP - Jagran Lakecity University, is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. ImaginXP - Jagran Lakecity University provides 6 UG and PG courses in 1 specialisation, namely UI / UX. Theses programmes are offered in Full Time mode. B.E. / B.Tech, BCA, B.Des and M.Des are some of the courses offered at ImaginXP - Jagran Lakecity University. Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Engineering, IT & Software and Design. The total fee at ImaginXP - Jagran Lakecity University ranges between INR 2,30,000 to 6,55,000. ImaginXP - Jagran Lakecity University offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

highlights.summary: Founded in 2018, Excel College for Commerce and Science, Excel Group Institutions is a private institute. It is located in Namakkal, Tamil Nadu. Excel College for Commerce and Science, Excel Group Institutions provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 26 courses across specialisations such as Biochemistry, Computer Science, English, Fashion Design and Mathematics. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.Sc., M.Sc., BCA, B.Com and B.A. Excel College for Commerce and Science, Excel Group Institutions offers these course across fields such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Design and Mass Communication & Media. Excel College for Commerce and Science, Excel Group Institutions offers all the campus facilities to students.

faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: What are the career opportunities after Commerce courses?
faqs.answer:
After completing the undergraduate level course under Commerce, the candidates can find various jobs at entry or junior level in Accounting, Commerce, Banking and Finance and related fields such as Junior Accountant, Operations Management,  Data Analyst, Research and Development Manager, Information Systems Manager,  Project Manager,  etc..

faqs.answer:
The graduates can get jobs in the public and private sector. In the public sector, some of the top recruiters are:
Indian Space Research Organisation
Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO)
National Institute of Oceanography (NIO)
Physical Research Laboratory, Ahmedabad
Saha Institute of Nuclear Physics, Kolkata
Bhabha Atomic Research Centre
Nuclear science centre

faqs.question: How is the scope of microbiology?
faqs.answer:
The scope of microbiology is huge because of the involvement of microbiology in various fields such as Pharmacy, Medicine, clinical research, agriculture, dairy industry, water industry, nanotechnology & chemical technology. 
A person who specialises in this field is called a Microbiologist. Some of the Jobs in this field are mentioned below -
1. Biomedical scientist
2. Bio technologist
3. Clinical research associate
4. Food technologist
5. Healthcare scientist, immunology
6. Medicinal chemist
7. Microbiologist
8. Nano technologist.

The fee structure includes multiple components, such as tuition fees, laboratory fees, security deposit, alumni fees, etc. Some of these are one-time payments that are charged by the Sasi Creative Institute of Design at the time of admission.

faqs.question: How costly is Sasi Creative Institute of Design?

answer.text: Established in 2019, Sasi Creative Institute of Design (SCID) is a private institute, located in Myleripalayam, Tamil Nadu. The institute is managed by the Swaminathan Rajalakshmi Educational Charitable Trust. SCID is approved by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and is affiliated with Alagappa University. Sasi Creative Institute of Design signed multiple MoUs with national and international organisations and institutes.Sasi Creative Institute of Design, Coimbatore is considered a good choice for a Bachelor of Design (BDes) in various specialisations, including Fashion Design, Interior Design, and Communication Design. It is one of the very few private multi-disciplinary centre for creative studies in Tamil Nadu. SCID has a high faculty-to-student ratio of over 1:8.

faqs.question: Is Sasi Creative Institute of Design worth getting admission in?

answer.text: Sasi Creative Institute of Design application process 2025 is conducted online. A step-by-step process for filling out the online application form is mentioned below:Step 1: Click on the ‘Apply Now' tab on the official website of SCID (scid.ac.in/admission-procedure/) and register as a new user by filling in details such as name, email ID, and password, in the registration form.Step 2: Verify the verification email sent to the registered email address.Step 3: Once verified, candidates will receive an email on the registered email with the user ID and password.Step 4: Pay the application fee online with a credit card/ debit card or net banking and submit the form.Note: To be considered for other courses offered by the Creative College of Design, which is to be mentioned at the end of the form, the non-refundable application fee is INR 1,275 for each additional course. In the event of an applicant applying for more than one course, a consolidated Demand Draft (DD) can be obtained, and the same can be referenced in the form.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to B.Des course at Sasi Creative Institute of Design?

answer.text: The physical environment of the Sasi Creative Institute of Design campus is structured to induce young minds to exercise their creative faculties. All the classes are conducted in hexagon-shaped rooms which have no blind spots, thereby bringing the whole classroom together, and leaving no student out. All the classrooms have ‘Idea walls’ where students can express their creative thoughts. Such classrooms are designed with the recommendations of educational psychologists to maximise the potential the students have, to learn a concept within a specific amount of time.For a professional, working as a part of a team is very important. Creative Colleges encourages collaborative learning among peers, as this facilitates a low-anxiety atmosphere wherein acquisition, rather than learning, takes root on a subconscious level.Creative Colleges encourages extra-curricular activities and sports. The institute provides a wide range of indoor and outdoor games. There are informal study areas in and around the institute where nature study and life sketches take place. Students also try out life-size installations in these areas.The campus is well-equipped with state-of-the-art infrastructure such as Digital Classrooms, Studios, Art rooms, Conference rooms, Computer Lab, Workshop, Seminar Hall, Auditorium, Fashion Studio, Drafting Studio, Digital Lab and Student Lounges. There is a full-fledged library with the latest national and international journals.The institute has full-fledged boys and girls hostels with all amenities to ensure students feel that it's their home. The day scholars are facilitated with comfortable vehicles connecting the different ends of the city. The campus is located at Myleripalayam on the Pollachi Highway which is only 18 kilometres from the heart of Coimbatore city.

faqs.question: What all experiences of Sasi Creative Institute of Design make it one of the best places to study at?

answer.text: Sasi Creative Institute of Design is a moderately competitive institute to get into, as its acceptance rate stands at 50%. This figure tells us that almost 50 out of every 100 applicants manage to get enrolled in the institute, which is more than half of all the applicants. Therefore, once an applicant fulfills Sasi Creative Institute of Design admission requirements i.e., competitive grades, standardised test scores, English language requirements as well as relevant documents, they are most likely to secure an admission in the institute. However, students must not take this lightly and apply to the institute within the deadlines in order to get enrolled as a student.

JD Institute of Fashion Technology Dehradun offers a wide range of courses including Undergraduate, Diploma, Advanced Diploma, and Certification programmes in the disciplines of Fashion and Interior Design, Jewellery Design, Communication Design, Pattern Making Technology, and Garment Manufacturing Technology, among others.
At the UG level, JDIFT Dehradun offers BSc and BFD programmes in various branches such as Fashion Design and Interior Design. The BSc programme offered by the college is highly popular due to its promising career prospects. JDIFT Dehradun follows an industry-aligned curriculum to help students gain practical knowledge with deep digital insights. The college has also established multiple partnerships to regularly organise industry-driven training and certification programmes, internship opportunities, and industry visits for students. highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding C.M.K. National P. G. Girls' College Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

reviews_list.review_title: Fair infrastructure and knowledgeable teachers. Affordable fee.

review_content.Placements: Coming to the placements, the college dissapoints me. Their is no systematic approach towards it. I'm totally dissapointed with it as one of the teachers in the college told me to do MBA from a reputed college, as the college lacks in providing job and internship opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms in college are quite spacious but most of those don't have smartboards. Labs are spacious too, but the computers and other equipment present in labs are outdated. Considering the sports field, there's no specific ground for it, but there are multiple park inside the college. The canteen offers good food and the pricing is affordable. The college is filled with greenery, as there are lots of trees planted, making it more attractive. I actually enjoy going to the library, as their is silence and the atmosphere around is just awesome! Coming to the hostel, it's fine, but some improvements can be made.

review_content.Placements: About 25% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary offered for our course is Rs. 50,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 16,000 per month. There is much scope to get teaching and government jobs. Many students have not got placements in companies. About 25% of students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a physics lab, a chemistry lab, a biology lab, and a geography lab. The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college has 2 buildings. The new building is quite good. We have one library with good books. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The hostel is Wi-Fi enabled. The quality of the food in the hostel mess is good. The food served in the canteen is average.

reviews_list.review_title: A decent college for those who want to pursue at low price.

review_content.Placements: Around 20% of students were placed, as most of the students did not appear for placements. The staff and teachers were quite cooperative and motivated students to attend the placement sessions. The highest package offered was 1.5 LPA. The placement cell needs to be improved as the packages offered for students are very less.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus provides full of facilities like good Wi-Fi connection. The hostel is also pretty good. Food at the mess is the best part of the hostel. The library is vast and fully air-conditioned. All in all, decent infrastructure. Sports equipment is also available. There is a music room also where you can learn to play different instruments. Canteen is also good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I would like to tell you that my college is best for computer science students.

content.Placements: As the students of National PG girls inter college for seeing BCA bachelor of computers degree, 58% of students got placed in BCA course. The highest package of this course is approximately 7 LPA to 8 LPA. The lowest package of this course is about 1.22 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Raise students of National girls PG inter college with person bachelors of computer degree, the facilities provided in a small classroom. We have library and Wi-Fi is all good. They are functioning well. The quality of facilities in our hostel is quite good. The medical, sports, and games facilities are occurring daily.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I would like to share that my college is best for those students who like to study.

content.Placements: As a student of C.M.K. National P. G. Girls' College, I like to say that my college placements give the highest package that ranges from 5-6 LPA. The lowest package ranges from 2-3 LPA. It is not mandatory for everyone to appear in the placement exam. Students have to pass the criteria of 75% attendance and with a good CGPA.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful to students. They are highly qualified and knowledgeable. The course curriculum is relevant. They are very helpful during our college semester examinations. As a student pursuing a BCA degree, my college faculty members are very cooperative and help us in our academic work. They provide practical knowledge through lab activities. I would like to say that my college is best for students who like to pursue a Bachelor of Computer Applications degree.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Fair infrastructure and knowledgeable teachers. Affordable fee.

content.Placements: Coming to the placements, the college dissapoints me. Their is no systematic approach towards it. I'm totally dissapointed with it as one of the teachers in the college told me to do MBA from a reputed college, as the college lacks in providing job and internship opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms in college are quite spacious but most of those don't have smartboards. Labs are spacious too, but the computers and other equipment present in labs are outdated. Considering the sports field, there's no specific ground for it, but there are multiple park inside the college. The canteen offers good food and the pricing is affordable. The college is filled with greenery, as there are lots of trees planted, making it more attractive. I actually enjoy going to the library, as their is silence and the atmosphere around is just awesome! Coming to the hostel, it's fine, but some improvements can be made.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides average placements.

content.Placements: About 25% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary offered for our course is Rs. 50,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 16,000 per month. There is much scope to get teaching and government jobs. Many students have not got placements in companies. About 25% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a physics lab, a chemistry lab, a biology lab, and a geography lab. The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college has 2 buildings. The new building is quite good. We have one library with good books. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The hostel is Wi-Fi enabled. The quality of the food in the hostel mess is good. The food served in the canteen is average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: A decent college for those who want to pursue at low price.

content.Placements: Around 20% of students were placed, as most of the students did not appear for placements. The staff and teachers were quite cooperative and motivated students to attend the placement sessions. The highest package offered was 1.5 LPA. The placement cell needs to be improved as the packages offered for students are very less.
content.Infrastructure: The campus provides full of facilities like good Wi-Fi connection. The hostel is also pretty good. Food at the mess is the best part of the hostel. The library is vast and fully air-conditioned. All in all, decent infrastructure. Sports equipment is also available. There is a music room also where you can learn to play different instruments. Canteen is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with teachers, infrastructure, facilities, and placements in 2022.

content.Placements: This was a government college. Our college did not provide placements. Our teachers arranged placements from outside. Internships were available for a better future and experience. Our college alumni were working in other countries.
content.Infrastructure: Our college buildings were old. It was an excellent college. The architecture of our college was not good.
content.Faculty: Our teachers were well-qualified and experienced. The curriculum is affiliated with Bharatiya University.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: This college is value for money.

content.Placements: Most of the students choose B.Com here. HCL, Infosys, TCS, HDFC Bank, and many other companies come to our college and conduct interviews. In our course, the minimum salary package offered is 1.5 LPA, and the maximum salary package offered is 3.5 LPA. Our course is about business and accounting field.
content.Infrastructure: Our college laboratories and library are good. Classrooms are very comfortable for students. Hostel facilities are not available. A canteen is available, and the food is affordable. Games and sports are good, and the coach is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Zoology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: This college is cost efficient with quality education.

content.Placements: They created the placements cell recently, and there are no on-campus interviews. Students have to get a job by off-campus drives and students can surely get a job in the IT field if students average. But placements for Zoology are narrow.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel facility and free Wi-Fi for students. The laboratory and library are neat enough. But the classroom could use a ceiling fan, new writing, and sitting desks. There is no canteen facility available. Students get to see the pet room a week before sports day.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college is the best compared to other colleges.

content.Placements: About 90% of students were placed in our course. Around 8 LPA is offered in our course. Top recruiting companies are HCL and Tech Mahindra. About 80% of students got internships from our course in Tech Mahindra company. In our college, playing is allowed.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, the facilities and infrastructure like rooms, hostel, benches, Wi-Fi, labs, and library are available for our course which are very good. The quality of the facilities in our hostel, the quality of food served in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports and games facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: There are experienced faculty members, and the fee is affordable.

content.Placements: Guidance is provided by faculty members to get placed well, but in on-campus placements, drives conducted are less. It is the same situation in all colleges for B.Sc in physics. If students are interested in getting placed with major job roles, the placement cell guides them for the interviews.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, the library has a great collection of books in various fields. Labs are highly equipped with the instruments which are required to perform experiments. The department also has its own computer lab for students to learn programming. Our college doesn't have hostel facility.
